glosses.ro: a se apropia; a se închide (ușa)
glosses.ja: 近づく; 閉まる（ドア）

translations.yue: 我想行埋去同佢傾下計。
translations.vi: Tôi muốn lại gần anh ấy.
translations.nl: Ik wil naar hem toe gaan.
translations.hi: मैं उसके पास जाना चाहता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg vil gå bort til ham.
translations.sv: Jag vill gå fram till honom.
translations.ro: Vreau să mă apropii de el.
translations.da: Jeg vil gå hen til ham.

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1sg) expressing volition; selects a bare infinitive verb at clause end.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a directional Goal phrase required by the verb ('auf + Akk' = toward).
3rd person masculine singular accusative personal pronoun; object of the preposition 'auf' (the target of approach).
Bare infinitive of a separable verb (zu- + gehen) meaning ‘approach’; lexical head selected by the modal; combines with directional PP 'auf + Akk'.

translations.en: You should reach out to her.
translations.yue: 你應該走埋去同佢傾下。
translations.pt: Você deveria ir falar com ela.
translations.vi: Bạn nên chủ động bắt chuyện với cô ấy.
translations.nl: Je zou naar haar toe moeten gaan.
translations.hi: तुम्हें उसके पास जाकर बात करनी चाहिए.
translations.nb: Du burde gå bort til henne.
translations.sv: Du borde gå fram till henne.
translations.ro: Ar trebui să vorbești cu ea.
translations.da: Du bør gå hen til hende.
translations.ja: 彼女に話しかけたほうがいいよ。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (preterite, 2sg) used deontically (‘ought to’); selects a bare infinitive at clause end.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the directional complement required by the verb.
3rd person feminine singular accusative personal pronoun; object of 'auf' (the target).
Bare infinitive of separable verb (zu- + gehen) meaning ‘approach’; complements the modal and combines with 'auf + Akk'.

sentences.target: Wir versuchen auf die Nachbarn zuzugehen.

translations.de: Wir versuchen auf die Nachbarn zuzugehen.
translations.en: We’re trying to reach out to the neighbors.
translations.es: Estamos intentando acercarnos a los vecinos.
translations.fr: On essaie de se rapprocher des voisins.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando di avvicinarci ai vicini.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正试着去跟邻居打交道。
translations.yue: 我哋嘗試主動同鄰居打交道。
translations.ru: Мы пытаемся наладить контакт с соседями.
translations.pt: Estamos tentando nos aproximar dos vizinhos.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang cố gắng làm quen với hàng xóm.
translations.nl: We proberen contact te leggen met de buren.
translations.uk: Ми намагаємося налагодити контакт із сусідами.
translations.hi: हम पड़ोसियों से जुड़ने की कोशिश कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Προσπαθούμε να έρθουμε σε επαφή με τους γείτονες.
translations.nb: Vi prøver å ta kontakt med naboene.
translations.id: Kami sedang berusaha menjalin kontak dengan para tetangga.
translations.sv: Vi försöker ta kontakt med grannarna.
translations.ro: Încercăm să luăm legătura cu vecinii.
translations.cs: Snažíme se navázat kontakt se sousedy.
translations.da: Vi prøver at tage kontakt til naboerne.
translations.ja: 近所の人たちに声をかけようとしています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present, 1pl) taking a zu-infinitive complement; subject controls the understood subject of the infinitive.
Preposition governing accusative; head of the directional PP complement.
Definite article, accusative plural; determiner of 'Nachbarn'.
Common noun, accusative plural; object of the preposition 'auf' (the target group).
Zu-infinitive of the separable verb 'zugehen'; the infinitival marker 'zu' is fused within the verb form (zu + zugehen → zuzugehen); complement of 'versuchen'.

sentences.target: Er lernt auf neue Leute zuzugehen.

translations.de: Er lernt auf neue Leute zuzugehen.
translations.en: He is learning to approach new people.
translations.es: Está aprendiendo a acercarse a gente nueva.
translations.fr: Il apprend à aller vers de nouvelles personnes.
translations.it: Sta imparando ad avvicinarsi a persone nuove.
translations.ko: 그는 새로운 사람들에게 다가가는 법을 배우고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他正在学习如何主动接触新朋友。
translations.yue: 佢喺學緊點樣主動接觸新嘅人。
translations.ru: Он учится подходить к новым людям.
translations.pt: Ele está aprendendo a se aproximar de pessoas novas.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang học cách tiếp cận những người mới.
translations.ar: إنه يتعلم كيف يقترب من أشخاص جدد.
translations.uk: Він вчиться підходити до нових людей.
translations.hi: वह नए लोगों के पास जाना सीख रहा है.
translations.pl: Uczy się podchodzić do nowych ludzi.
translations.nb: Han lærer å gå bort til nye folk.
translations.id: Dia sedang belajar mendekati orang baru.
translations.sv: Han lär sig att gå fram till nya människor.
translations.ro: El învață să se apropie de oameni noi.
translations.da: Han lærer at gå hen til nye mennesker.
translations.ja: 彼は新しい人に自分から話しかけることを学んでいる。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present, 3sg) taking a zu-infinitive complement.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the directional PP complement.
Attributive adjective, accusative plural; modifier of 'Leute'.
Common plural-only noun, accusative; object of 'auf' (the target group).
Zu-infinitive of separable verb 'zugehen'; infinitival 'zu' is fused; complements 'lernt' (‘is learning to approach’).
